notes: install wine 64 if not already installed, use Mario's guide "https://steamcommunity.com/app/707030/discussions/2/2733047810446258035/#c2733047810446529200" to install the Media Foundation . After that it will work :)

title: POSTAL 4: No Regerts

notes:
Use Media Foundation workaround for Wine (https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install).
To install, download ZIP file from github. go to /home/STEAMUSER/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/707030/ and extract zip there.
Then open terminal and paste this code (replacing STEAMUSER with yours):
WINEPREFIX="/home/STEAMUSER/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/707030/pfx" ./install-mf.sh

Game is VERY janky and unoptimized, but it is playable.
title: POSTAL 4: No Regerts

notes: Janky Alpha build tested. Performance is to be expected with alpha, cut-scenes in intro do not run so need to be skipped, but besides that it's fully playable.
